substantial_equivalence_rationale.value: the intended use and indications for use for the apollo tms therapy system and predicate devices are identical the apollo tms therapy system and the secondary predicate device have equivalent system components consisting of a main unit available in two variants 918001 apollo and 918010 apollo

evidence.snippet: compared to the standard stimulation protocol blumberger et al 20181 substantial equivalence the apollo tms therapy system is substantially equivalent to its predicate devices the horizon tms therapy system k182853 and apollo tms therapy system k180313 the intended use and indications for use for the apollo tms therapy system and predicate devices are identical the apollo tms therapy system and the secondary predicate device have equivalent system components consisting of a main unit available in two variants 918001 apollo and 918010 apollo
